name: Boston Cream Pie1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine 1/3 cup shortening and 2/3 cup sugar. Cook over medium heat until the mixture is melted and smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the sifted cake flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Gradually add milk to the dry ingredients, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9-inch round cake pan. Bake at 325°F for 25-30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Cool the cake in the pan for 10 minutes, then remove and cool completely on a wire rack.
6. Split the cooled cake horizontally to create two layers. Spread the cream filling between the layers and over the top with chocolate glaze. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Yield: 8-10 servings
